name: mcc
description: MCC Multi-target Claude/Codex Configuration - 19 agents + 15 commands + 22 skills + 3 behavioral modes + 28 hook scripts + 5 MCP servers + curated rules. v2.5.10 follows up on v2.5.6-v2.5.9 codex patches (silent hook skip / TOML [[xx]] / Set whitelist / self-contained uninstaller / unified AGENTS.md wording / require.main guard), unifies state files under docs/, and adds the dev-changelog skill.
